---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "join_uns_to_obs"
namespace: "Metadata"
description: "Join a data frame of length 1 (1 row index value) in .uns containing metadata to the .obs of a mudata file."
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `join_uns_to_obs`  
Namespace: `metadata`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/metadata/join_uns_to_obs)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/metadata/join_uns_to_obs)

:::



## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/metadata/join_uns_to_obs/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/metadata/join_uns_to_obs).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/metadata/join_uns_to_obs/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).

## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name                   |Description                                                  |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`              |Input h5mu file                                              |`file`, required, example: `"input.h5mu"`  |
|`--modality`           |Which modality from the input MuData file to process.        |`string`, default: `"rna"`                 |
|`--uns_key`            |Lookup key from .uns pointing to the input data.             |`string`, required                         |
|`--output`             |Output h5mu file.                                            |`file`, required, example: `"output.h5mu"` |
|`--output_compression` |The compression format to be used on the output h5mu object. |`string`, example: `"gzip"`                |
